expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: The review header states 'Target: origin/v18/dev' and the body references 'The current major version on v18/dev is 18 (from version.json)'.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: The summary section discusses the runtime behavior change: 'Any existing Umbraco 18 installation that does not explicitly configure Umbraco:CMS:Webhook:PayloadType will have its webhook payload changed from Legacy to Minimal after upgrading.' It also lists all affected consumers (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions).
Review is 23 lines, well under the 150 line limit.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: Both findings are substantive: the [Obsolete] removal version (v19 vs v20) and the stale WebhookSettings.cs documentation. No cosmetic issues flagged.

expectations.text: Does NOT flag the ~30 builder extension methods with Legacy defaults (pre-existing, not changed in the PR)
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention the builder extension methods or their Legacy defaults. It stays scoped to the 3 changed files and their direct impacts.

expectations.text: Flags stale WebhookSettings.cs docs as a side-effect of the constant value change
expectations.evidence: The second Important finding explicitly states: 'WebhookSettings.cs (not in diff -- pre-existing, but made incorrect by this PR): The remarks on PayloadType still reads... This comment is now factually wrong since DefaultPayloadType resolves to Minimal. While pre-existing, this PR's change is what renders it incorrect.'

expectations.text: Identifies affected consumers outside the PR (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, or WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions)
expectations.evidence: The summary explicitly lists all three: 'WebhookSettings.StaticPayloadType (derives its default from DefaultPayloadType)', 'WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions.AddCms default parameter', and 'UmbracoBuilder.Collections.cs uses DefaultPayloadType as its fallback'.
